task_completion.description: Agent opens and reads the Jupiter arrival specifications file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of ~/Desktop/joi_specifications.txt.

task_completion.description: Agent configures the GMAT spacecraft and propagator for a Jupiter-centered point-mass simulation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GMAT GUI showing 'Jupiter' selected as the central body in the Spacecraft orbit properties or the Propagator settings, with point-mass gravity configured.

task_completion.description: Agent sets up a targeting sequence in GMAT to achieve the desired Semi-Major Axis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GMAT Mission Tree showing a 'Target' sequence containing an 'ImpulsiveBurn' (or Maneuver) at Periapsis and an 'Achieve' command targeting an SMA of 9850000 km.

task_completion.description: Agent successfully runs the GMAT simulation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GMAT GUI showing a completed run, visible through an orbit trajectory plot around Jupiter, or a Message Window indicating the targeting sequence converged successfully.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the GMAT script to the required directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GMAT GUI title bar showing 'joi_sim.script', a 'Save As' dialog pointing to ~/Documents/missions/, or a terminal/file manager showing the file exists in that path.

task_completion.description: Agent creates the final results text file with the required format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the creation of ~/GMAT_output/joi_results.txt containing 'required_deltav_m_s', 'final_sma_km', and 'final_eccentricity' with their respective calculated values.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the GMAT application to model the mission.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GMAT application open and being actively used (Resources tree, Mission tree, or output plots), rather than just writing a script in a text editor without testing it.

integrity.description: The final results are derived from the simulation rather than hallucinated or hardcoded.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values entered into joi_results.txt should correspond to the output reports, command window results, or targeting convergence values visible in the GMAT GUI.

integrity.description: Agent uses the exact file paths requested in the prompt.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent must explicitly save to ~/Documents/missions/joi_sim.script and ~/GMAT_output/joi_results.txt, not generic default directories like ~/Documents/GMAT/.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target SMA: 9850000.0 km (Tolerance: ±20000.0 km). Expected Delta-V: ~833.0 m/s (Tolerance: ±25.0 m/s). Expected Eccentricity: ~0.992 (Tolerance: ±0.007). The GMAT script must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/missions/joi_sim.script and results to /home/ga/GMAT_output/joi_results.txt.
